## Why It Is Useful

This external resource focuses on scientific writing, literature-grounded
drafting, citation handling, and research report workflows.

## Use In This Repository

No text, prompts, examples, code, or files from the external repository are
copied or adapted here. It is linked for future review because its scope
overlaps with writing, citation, and review skills already imported from
K-Dense sources.
